metadata.description: Agiterra plugins — persistent identity, inter-agent communication, dependency resolution

plugins.name: wire
plugins.description: Wire inbound adapter — SSE connection and MCP channel notifications

plugins.name: wire-ipc
plugins.description: Wire IPC — Ed25519 signed outbound messaging between agents

plugins.name: crew
plugins.description: Crew orchestration — launch and manage agents in persistent screen sessions

plugins.name: github
plugins.description: GitHub webhook tools — register PR webhooks, manage lifecycle, HMAC validation

plugins.name: knowledge
plugins.description: Knowledge vault runtime — journal, search, enrichment, compaction for .knowledge/ directories

plugins.name: knowledge-indexer
plugins.description: Auto-indexes knowledge vault files on write — Haiku sidecar for keywords + vectors

plugins.name: operator-relay
plugins.description: Forwards operator prompts on ephemeral agents to managing agents via Wire

plugins.name: crew-themes
plugins.description: Pane background themes for Crew — 6 bundled themes plus tools to author your own. SUPER EASY.
